descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] {Pierce DMG} to all enemies, which enjoys an additional [Arg3]% {Tentacle DMG} and {STR} bonus. Make all Tentacles attack [Arg2] {plural:[Arg2]|time|times}, dealing {Pierce DMG}. {Aftershock}: Command 1 Tentacle to attack.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] {Pierce DMG} to all enemies, which enjoys an additional [Arg3]% {Tentacle DMG} and {STR} bonus. Make all Tentacles attack [Arg2] {plural:[Arg2]|time|times}, dealing {Pierce DMG}. If the current Stance is {Tranquil Sea}, reduce Arithmetica Cost by 2. {Aftershock}: Command 1 Tentacle to attack.
